name: devflow
description: Structured architecture, plan, dev, auto-dev, and review workflow for large development tasks with persisted task state and markdown artifacts.

interface.shortDescription: Architect with DevFlow, execute work with devflow-task
interface.longDescription: Coordinate complex software tasks through DevFlow architecture discovery plus the `devflow-task` implementation workflow, optional auto-dev execution loop, and persisted task state and markdown artifacts.
defaultPrompt: Use devflow-task plan to create a tracked implementation task
Use DevFlow Architect to turn this feature request into executable architecture docs
Create a DevFlow architecture package for this system and then bind a task to one module
Resume the active task and tell me the next action
Run devflow-task auto-dev, review, or done on the current task
